An error occurred while deleting the fam: Hitilafu ilitokea wakati wa kufuta familia.
An error occurred while moving donations: Hitilafu ilitokea wakati wa kuhamisha michango.
Cannot delete a family with donation rec: Haiwezekani kufuta familia yenye kumbukumbu za michango. Wasiliana na msimamizi wa fedha.
Cannot move property in that direction: Haiwezekani kuhamisha mali katika mwelekeo huo
ForegroundColor and BackgroundColor are: Rangi ya mbele na rangi ya nyuma zinahitajika.
Group not found or has no special proper: Kikundi hakipatikani au hakina sifa maalum
Invalid color format. Use hex colors lik: Muundo wa rangi si sahihi. Tumia rangi za hex kama #FF0000.
Please review your family information be: Tafadhali kagua taarifa za familia yako hapa chini na uthibitishe au omba mabadiliko.
You can review and verify your family in: Unaweza kukagua na kuthibitisha taarifa za familia yako kwa kutumia kiungo hapa chini. Ikiwa unahitaji ufikiaji zaidi, tafadhali wasiliana na msimamizi wa kanisa lako.
You do not have permission to view this: Huna ruhusa ya kuona mtu huyu
